name: no-execSync-interpolation
assertion: No instances of execSync with template literal string interpolation of user input exist in src/

name: no-innerHTML-with-dynamic-data
assertion: No innerHTML assignments with dynamic/user-controlled data exist in src/ or frontend/

name: path-validation-on-config-endpoints
assertion: GET /api/config/:name and PUT /api/config/:name both use safeConfigName() validator

name: vault-slug-validation
assertion: writeNode() in vault.mjs validates slug and category against SAFE_NAME regex before path construction

name: sandbox-env-restricted
assertion: Sandbox env whitelist does NOT include HOME, SHELL, USER, or AGENT_DIR

name: sandbox-timeout-capped
assertion: Sandbox timeout is capped at max 30 seconds server-side regardless of client input

name: no-hardcoded-tokens
assertion: No hardcoded PAT tokens (tr_*) exist in source code files

name: isLocalRequest-no-forwarded-headers
assertion: isLocalRequest() only checks req.socket.remoteAddress, not X-Forwarded-For

name: brain-export-excludes-secrets
assertion: GET /api/brain/export tar command excludes security.yml, keys.jsonl, and session-secret

name: mitigations-script-passes
assertion: run-audit.mjs reports all mitigations as verified (mitigations_passed === mitigations_checked)
